zh.lifeSummary: 當Isobel Craig於1626年5月21日出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Thomas Craig26歲，母親Euphame Broun21歲。她於1648年4月16日與Walter Archbald在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪笛卡爾 阿爾迪結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1680年享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isobel Craig于1626年5月21日出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲Thomas Craig26岁，母亲Euphame Broun21岁。她于1648年4月16日与Walter Archbald在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪笛卡爾 阿爾迪结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1680年享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Craig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived near a steep or precipitous rock, Older Scots crag, craig. Compare the synonymous English Cragg .

Manx: either a shortened form of Gaelic Mac Concharraige ‘son of Cu Charraige (‘hound of the rock’) or possibly of Mac Thorveig ‘son of Thorveig’, from the Old Norse personal name Thórveig (from the god's name Thórr + veig ‘pith, strength’).

variants.name: Cragg
meanings: topographic name from Middle English crag, in surnames occasionally crak ‘crag, rock’, chiefly found in northwestern England. It is derived from Irish creag and was probably introduced from Ireland by Norwegian Vikings.
(Suffolk): from Middle English crak (Old Norse krákr) ‘carrion crow’, sometimes voiced to crag.

variants.name: Craige
meanings: Manx and Scottish: variant of   Craig  .

nameMeanings.name: Isobel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isobel Craig was born on 21 May 1626, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Craig, was 26 and her mother, Euphame Broun, was 21. She married Walter Archbald on 16 April 1648, in Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1680, at the age of 54.

Elle a épousé Walter Archbald le 16 avril 1648, à Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1680, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Isobel Craig(이)가 1626년 5월 21일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Craig(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Euphame Broun(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1648년 4월 16일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 압르디 드 압르디에서 Walter Archbald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1680년 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isobel Craig nasceu em 21 de maio de 1626, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Craig, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Euphame Broun, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Archbald em 16 de abril de 1648, em Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1680, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isobel Craig родилась 21 мая 1626 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Craig было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphame Broun, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Archbald 16 апреля 1648 г. в местности олд абирдин, абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1680 г. в возрасте 54 лет.
